full_prompt: Design a strut arm for a navigation lock miter gate per USACE EM 1110-2-2105 (Design of Hydraulic Steel Structures), supporting hydrostatic + hydrodynamic water loads transferred from the gate leaf to the sill. The canonical lock is a 110 x 1,200 ft lock with gate leaf 66 ft (20.1 m) high x 55 ft (16.8 m) wide half-span. Strut arm envelope: 12 m long x 400 mm x 400 mm box section welded from ASTM A709 Grade 50 structural steel (yield 345 MPa, UTS 450 MPa, E 200 GPa, density 7850 kg/m^3, Charpy 20 J at -18 C per USACE cold-climate requirement); corrosion protection coal-tar epoxy per CW-09940. Interfaces: gate-side pin connection 200 mm diameter steel pin; sill-side pin connection 200 mm diameter steel pin; strut arm is straight with no intermediate fabrication splices. Load cases per EM 1110-2-2105 Table 3-1: LC1 Normal operating: hydrostatic from 66 ft water column with normal pool differential 33 ft = 1,044 kN total thrust on one gate leaf, reacted through the strut arm in axial compression; LC2 Unusual operating: 50-year storm differential 40 ft = 1,265 kN; LC3 Extreme: 100-year check flood 50 ft differential = 1,580 kN + transient hydrodynamic overpressure from gate slam (50% amplification) = 2,370 kN; LC4 Ice load 5 kPa hydrostatic ice pressure over submerged gate area = 150 kN additional axial; LC5 Barge impact 400 kN lateral per EM 1110-2-2602; LC6 fatigue from daily lockage cycles ~30 cycles/day over 50-year life = 550,000 cycles at normal operating amplitude. Pass/fail per EM 1110-2-2105 Table 3-1: (R1) Normal LC1 max von Mises <= 0.5 x yield = 173 MPa (SF 2.0 normal); (R2) Unusual LC2 + LC4 <= 0.75 x yield = 259 MPa (SF 1.33); (R3) Extreme LC3 <= 0.9 x yield = 311 MPa (SF 1.11); (R4) barge impact LC5 combined with LC1 <= 0.9 x yield = 311 MPa; (R5) column buckling slenderness kL/r <= 120 (compression member per AISC 360 for hydraulic structures); (R6) weld fatigue per AWS D1.1 + AISC 360 Appendix 3 fatigue Category B for rolled/welded stringer detail at 550,000 cycles >= infinite-life 3.5 x 10^6 cycle threshold - so must satisfy variable-amplitude fatigue with DEL; (R7) mass <= 15 tonnes; (R8) coating DFT >= 400 um coal-tar epoxy per CW-09940. Deliverables: STEP AP242 weldment + AWS D1.1 weld procedures; AISC LRFD load combinations with EM 1110-2-2105 safety factors applied; fatigue DEL report.
short_prompt:
Design a strut arm for a navigation lock miter gate per USACE EM 1110-2-2105 (Design of Hydraulic Steel Structures), supporting hydrostatic + hydrodynamic water loads from the gate leaf to the sill. Canonical lock: 110 x 1,200 ft with gate leaf 66 ft (20.1 m) x 55 ft (16.8 m) half-span.

Geometry: straight 12 m long 400 x 400 mm welded box section, no intermediate splices. Pin connections 200 mm diameter at each end.

Material: ASTM A709 Grade 50 plate, Charpy 20 J at -18 C per USACE cold-climate requirement. Corrosion protection: coal-tar epoxy per CW-09940, DFT >= 400 um.

Load cases per EM 1110-2-2105 Table 3-1.
- LC1 Normal: hydrostatic 66 ft column with 33 ft differential = 1,044 kN axial thrust.
- LC2 Unusual: 50-year storm differential 40 ft = 1,265 kN.
- LC3 Extreme: 100-year check flood 50 ft differential = 1,580 kN + transient gate-slam overpressure (50% amplification) = 2,370 kN.
- LC4 Ice: 5 kPa hydrostatic ice pressure over submerged gate area = 150 kN additional axial.
- LC5 Barge impact 400 kN lateral per EM 1110-2-2602.
- LC6 fatigue: ~30 lockage cycles/day over 50 years = 550,000 cycles at normal-operating amplitude.

Safety factors per EM 1110-2-2105 Table 3-1: Normal SF 2.0; Unusual SF 1.33; Extreme SF 1.11. Slenderness kL/r <= 120. Weld fatigue per AWS D1.1 + AISC 360 Appendix 3 Category B (variable-amplitude DEL). Mass <= 15 tonnes.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: AISC 360 compression-member strength is a closed-form code check.

prompt.title: ASTM A709 Grade 50 lock miter gate strut arm per USACE EM 1110-2-2105
prompt.brief: Design a 12 m box-section strut arm for a 66 ft x 55 ft miter gate, surviving normal/unusual/extreme + ice + barge impact + 50-year fatigue per EM 1110-2-2105.

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: AWS D1.1 + AISC 360 Appendix 3 Category B infinite life threshold

recommended_fea_setup.element_type: shell (box walls) + solid at pin fittings
analysis_types: linear static x6 + column buckling + AWS fatigue DEL

exclusions_explained.vibration_analysis: Hydrodynamic gate-slam treated as static overpressure amplification; full dynamic analysis out of scope.

notes.numeric_source: EM 1110-2-2105 Table 3-1 safety factors (normal 2.0, unusual 1.33, extreme 1.11); ASTM A709 Gr 50 allowables.

eval_coverage: tiered load-combo safety factors (normal / unusual / extreme)
